2026-03-13T00:32:11.212+05:30 WARN 9820 --- [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-03-13T00:32:11.448+05:30 INFO 9820 --- [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists announcement cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists attendance cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists audit_log cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists department cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists designation cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists employee cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists goal cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists holiday cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists leave_application cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists leave_balance cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists notification cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists performance_review cascade Hibernate: drop sequence if exists announce_seq Hibernate: drop sequence if exists att_seq Hibernate: drop sequence if exists audit_seq Hibernate: drop sequence if exists emp_seq Hibernate: drop sequence if exists goal_seq Hibernate: drop sequence if exists holiday_seq Hibernate: drop sequence if exists leave_balance_seq Hibernate: drop sequence if exists pr_seq Hibernate: create sequence announce_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence att_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence audit_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence emp_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence goal_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence holiday_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence leave_balance_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create sequence pr_seq start with 1 increment by 1 Hibernate: create table announcement (is_active boolean, announcement_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, created_by bigint, title varchar(200) not null, content varchar(3000) not null, primary key (announcement_id)) Hibernate: create table attendance (date_col date not null, att_id bigint not null, employee_id bigint not null, status enum ('ABSENT','HOLIDAY','LEAVE','PRESENT') not null, primary key (att_id), unique (employee_id, date_col)) Hibernate: create table audit_log (action_time timestamp(6) not null, entity_id bigint, log_id bigint not null, performed_by bigint not null, entity_type varchar(50), action varchar(300) not null, primary key (log_id)) Hibernate: create table department (dept_id bigint generated by default as identity, dept_name varchar(100) not null unique, primary key (dept_id)) Hibernate: create table designation (desig_id bigint generated by default as identity, desig_name varchar(100) not null unique, primary key (desig_id)) Hibernate: create table employee (joining_date date, salary float(53), dept_id bigint, desig_id bigint, employee_id bigint not null, manager_id bigint, phone varchar(20), email varchar(150) not null unique, name varchar(150) not null, emergency_contact varchar(200), security_answer varchar(200), security_question varchar(200), address varchar(300), password varchar(255) not null, role enum ('ADMIN','EMPLOYEE','MANAGER') not null, status enum ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE') not null, primary key (employee_id)) Hibernate: create table goal (deadline date, progress_percent integer, employee_id bigint not null, goal_id bigint not null, review_id bigint, goal_description varchar(1000) not null, manager_comments varchar(1000), priority enum ('HIGH','LOW','MEDIUM') not null, status enum ('COMPLETED','IN_PROGRESS','NOT_STARTED') not null, primary key (goal_id)) Hibernate: create table holiday (holiday_date date not null unique, holiday_id bigint not null, holiday_name varchar(150) not null, primary key (holiday_id)) Hibernate: create table leave_application (from_date date not null, to_date date not null, applied_on timestamp(6), employee_id bigint not null, leave_id bigint generated by default as identity, manager_id bigint, manager_comments varchar(500), reason varchar(500), leave_type enum ('CASUAL_LEAVE','PAID_LEAVE','SICK_LEAVE') not null, status enum ('APPROVED','CANCELLED','PENDING','REJECTED') not null, primary key (leave_id)) Hibernate: create table leave_balance (casual_leave integer not null, paid_leave integer not null, sick_leave integer not null, employee_id bigint not null unique, leave_balance_id bigint not null, primary key (leave_balance_id)) Hibernate: create table notification (is_read boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6), employee_id bigint not null, notification_id bigint generated by default as identity, ref_id bigint, message varchar(500) not null, type enum ('GENERAL','GOAL_ASSIGNED','LEAVE_APPLIED','LEAVE_APPROVED','LEAVE_REJECTED','REVIEW_FEEDBACK','REVIEW_SUBMITTED'), primary key (notification_id)) Hibernate: create table performance_review (manager_rating integer, review_year integer not null, self_rating integer, employee_id bigint not null, review_id bigint not null, accomplishments varchar(2000), areas_of_improvement varchar(2000), key_deliverables varchar(2000), manager_feedback varchar(2000), status enum ('DRAFT','REVIEWED','SUBMITTED'), primary key (review_id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists announcement add constraint FKmx7fe5b77pn308q71gto6ulmy foreign key (created_by) references employee Hibernate: alter table if exists attendance add constraint FKr7q0h8jfngkyybll6o9r3h9ua foreign key (employee_id) references employee Hibernate: alter table if exists audit_log add constraint FK6c8hqvbha67ittqceq7d15jq8 foreign key (performed_by) references employee Hibernate: alter table if exists employee add constraint FKaqchbcb8i6nvtl9g6c72yba0p foreign key (dept_id) references department Hibernate: alter table if exists employee add constraint FKmr55wiec420mxhu78p2f1eebl foreign key (desig_id) references designation Hibernate: alter table if exists employee add constraint FKou6wbxug1d0qf9mabut3xqblo foreign key (manager_id) references employee Hibernate: alter table if exists goal add constraint FK52vhw3t1nm8qcp6g2th9v10ow foreign key (employee_id) references employee Hibernate: alter table if exists goal add constraint FKs4t03xobxuie46yqjpy04xqs2 foreign key (review_id) references performance_review Hibernate: alter table if exists leave_application add constraint FK5wn6nda4428nqlooiul7swpeq foreign key (employee_id) references employee Hibernate: alter table if exists leave_application add constraint FKt9ghmau1nkphhcvbyox02l2qc foreign key (manager_id) references employee Hibernate: alter table if exists leave_balance add constraint FK9ueylmeksoyp2jvtdiovselp7 foreign key (employee_id) references employee Hibernate: alter table if exists notification add constraint FK858apfribgisso7wslgvebtxy foreign key (employee_id) references employee Hibernate: alter table if exists performance_review add constraint FK9159yuocyhexftv11wmay20cg foreign key (employee_id) references employee 2026-03-13T00:32:11.499+05:30 INFO 9820 --- [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-03-13T00:32:11.731+05:30 INFO 9820 --- [ main] c.rev.app.repository.GoalRepositoryTest : Started GoalRepositoryTest in 0.966 seconds (process running for 98.124) Hibernate: select next value for emp_seq Hibernate: select next value for emp_seq Hibernate: select next value for emp_seq Hibernate: insert into employee (address,dept_id,desig_id,email,emergency_contact,joining_date,manager_id,name,password,phone,role,salary,security_answer,security_question,status,employee_id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into employee (address,dept_id,desig_id,email,emergency_contact,joining_date,manager_id,name,password,phone,role,salary,security_answer,security_question,status,employee_id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into employee (address,dept_id,desig_id,email,emergency_contact,joining_date,manager_id,name,password,phone,role,salary,security_answer,security_question,status,employee_id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select next value for goal_seq Hibernate: select next value for goal_seq Hibernate: insert into goal (deadline,employee_id,goal_description,manager_comments,review_id,priority,progress_percent,status,goal_id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: insert into goal (deadline,employee_id,goal_description,manager_comments,review_id,priority,progress_percent,status,goal_id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) Hibernate: select g1_0.goal_id,g1_0.deadline,g1_0.employee_id,g1_0.goal_description,g1_0.manager_comments,g1_0.review_id,g1_0.priority,g1_0.progress_percent,g1_0.status from goal g1_0 left join employee e1_0 on e1_0.employee_id=g1_0.employee_id where e1_0.manager_id=?

Hibernate: select g1_0.goal_id,g1_0.deadline,g1_0.employee_id,g1_0.goal_description,g1_0.manager_comments,g1_0.review_id,g1_0.priority,g1_0.progress_percent,g1_0.status from goal g1_0 where g1_0.employee_id=?
